signup.heading: Join Vendee Today
signup.usernameDescription: It should be 3–20 characters long, unique, start with a letter and contain only letters, numbers, or underscores.
signup.emailDescription: We will use it to verify your account and help you recover access if needed.
signup.passwordDescription: Create a secure password with at least 8 characters. Use a mix of letters, numbers and symbols for better protection.
signup.successAlertDescription: A registration confirmation email has been sent to your email address. If you don't see the email, check your spam folder.
